since_last: 60% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +5.06%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.04% · BTC +2.77% · Gold +1.33% · Nasdaq100 -1.40%. 60% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +5.06%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +5.06%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.24%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at -13.55%
cards.body: Leaders: APP +10.71%, META +10.03%, CRWD +9.62%, PLTR +9.26%, SNAP +7.77%. Laggards: KLAC -13.55%, TER -11.81%, LRCX -11.76%, AMAT -11.25%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -8.10% at $157.02
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -8.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
